note: Cat bond trigger term validation. Vector 1: attachment breached, pro-rata within layer. Vector 2: below attachment (BELOW_ATTACHMENT). Vector 3: at exactly attachment point.

vectors.name: within_layer_pro_rata
vectors.description: $1B cat bond: $500M attachment, $1B exhaustion, $500M layer. Reported loss $750M breaches attachment. Pro-rata payout = (750M-500M)/(1B-500M) * 500M = 250M. Swiss Re 2025 industry loss trigger pattern.

output_payload.table_source: ISDA/IAIS cat bond trigger definitions; Swiss Re sigma 1/2024; ARTEMIS.bm cat bond market data Q1 2026; NAIC catastrophe bond guidelines
output_payload.regulatory_basis: ISDA/IAIS cat bond trigger definitions; Swiss Re sigma cat bond trigger methodology (indemnity / industry loss index / parametric / modelled loss). Layer arithmetic per standard IAIS ICP 13 reinsurance principles.
output_payload.pii_note: ZERO PII: layer terms and aggregate loss amounts only. No policyholder, claimant, or event-specific personal data enters this kernel.
output_payload.not_legal_advice: Not legal or actuarial advice. Final payout determination requires review of the controlling bond indenture and independent loss verification.

vectors.name: below_attachment_no_payout
vectors.description: Reported loss $400M below $500M attachment point. No cat bond payment triggered. Layer position BELOW_ATTACHMENT. Checks zero-payout path.

output_payload.table_source: ISDA/IAIS cat bond trigger definitions; Swiss Re sigma 1/2024; ARTEMIS.bm cat bond market data Q1 2026; NAIC catastrophe bond guidelines
output_payload.regulatory_basis: ISDA/IAIS cat bond trigger definitions; Swiss Re sigma cat bond trigger methodology (indemnity / industry loss index / parametric / modelled loss). Layer arithmetic per standard IAIS ICP 13 reinsurance principles.
output_payload.pii_note: ZERO PII: layer terms and aggregate loss amounts only. No policyholder, claimant, or event-specific personal data enters this kernel.
output_payload.not_legal_advice: Not legal or actuarial advice. Final payout determination requires review of the controlling bond indenture and independent loss verification.

vectors.name: above_exhaustion_full_payout
vectors.description: Reported loss $1.2B exceeds $1B exhaustion point. Full $500M cat bond layer paid out. Checks exhaustion path and pro_rata_factor = 1.

output_payload.table_source: ISDA/IAIS cat bond trigger definitions; Swiss Re sigma 1/2024; ARTEMIS.bm cat bond market data Q1 2026; NAIC catastrophe bond guidelines
